technology.title: Realme Buds T500 Pro Review: Pocket-Friendly
technology.summary: The Realme Buds T500 Pro comes loaded with interesting features and benefits. The earbuds feature 12.4mm drivers for high-quality sound. The earbuds also support active noise cancellation up to 40 dB of noise reduction. It has an IP55 rating, making it dust- and splash-resistant. It also comes with up to 56 hours of battery life with the case, while the earbuds deliver up to 8 hours of backup without ANC. The charging is as fast as well, and you get 2 hours of music playback with 10 minutes of quick charge.
